rumbleId.Wiki: ID of the rumble type to use.

hdPadRumbleId.Wiki: ID of the rumble type to use for HD Pads.

priority.Wiki: Higher values correlate to higher priority.

targetType.Wiki: Only valid when called from a PC TAE. Setting this to ''PC Only'' disabled distance attenuation-related parameters.

isUpdateDist.Wiki: Distance at which attenuation is reflected in real time.

isUpdateLand.Wiki: Magnification to apply to the rumble when on land.

airRateSelf.Wiki: Rumble magnification while in the air.

landRateSelf.Wiki: Rumble magnification while on the ground.

landRateAnother.Wiki: Rumble magnification for NPCs on the ground.
